DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES ; REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE; APPENDIX OF NON-CALIFORNIA IN SUPPORT FILED BY DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A HEARING SET FOR APR-22-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST, 2ND AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT HAS TAKEN JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE PURCHASE AND ASSUMPTION AGREEMENT BETWEEN DEFENDANT AND THE FDIC. EVIDENCE CODE SECTION 452 ("OFFICIAL ACTS"). THAT AGREEMENT PROVIDES THAT THE FDIC, NOT DEFENDANT, ASSUMED THE LIABILITIES FOR THE CLAIMS SUCH AS THOSE ASSERTED BY PLAINTIFF IN THIS COMPLAINT RELATED TO WAMU'S ACTS. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION (VIOLATION OF THE UCL) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST IDENTIFY THE PARTICULAR STATUTORY SCHEME THAT WAS VIOLATED AND DESCRIBE WITH PARTICULARITY THE FACT SUPPORTING THE STATUTORY ELEMENTS OF THE VIOLATION. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION (INJUNCTIVE RELIEF) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. AS WITH THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS SHOWING THE SPECIFIC GROUNDS FOR EQUITABLE RELIEF. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST, 2ND AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT HAS TAKEN JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE PURCHASE AND ASSUMPTION AGREEMENT BETWEEN DEFENDANT AND THE FDIC. EVIDENCE CODE SECTION 452 ("OFFICIAL ACTS"). THAT AGREEMENT PROVIDES THAT THE FDIC, NOT DEFENDANT, ASSUMED THE LIABILITIES FOR THE CLAIMS SUCH AS THOSE ASSERTED BY PLAINTIFF IN THIS COMPLAINT RELATED TO WAMU'S ACTS.
DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION (VIOLATION OF THE UCL) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST IDENTIFY THE PARTICULAR STATUTORY SCHEME THAT WAS VIOLATED AND DESCRIBE WITH PARTICULARITY THE FACT SUPPORTING THE STATUTORY ELEMENTS OF THE VIOLATION.
DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION (INJUNCTIVE RELIEF) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. AS WITH THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS SHOWING THE SPECIFIC GROUNDS FOR EQUITABLE RELIEF. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M.
